$comment: Hard CI LOC limits per module — dev-docs/design/01-architecture.md §11. Counted like the reference baseline: all .ts incl. comments & blanks, *.test.ts / *.spec.ts excluded. `total` is the derived sum of the budgets (asserted by scripts/loc-budget.mjs); never hand-edit it as a gate. Editing any per-module number requires a rationale line in the same PR (§11 speed bump).
